MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Set For Trial On Sep-20-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-03-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Off Calendar

JUDICIAL MEDIATION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Continued To Jun-15-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Klimenko for and with John Hartnett (Plaintiff). David Delbon for City & County of San Francisco. Robert Brown for Shamrock Properties Holdings, LLC, Peter Naughton and Bernadette Naughton (Defendants). Jerry Arthur for York Insurance Services Group.

Mediation was held. The Parties settled. The terms of the settlement were recited for the record. Mr. Hartnett and all Counsel stated that they agreed to and understood the terms of the settlement. In exchange for the payment of the total sum of $40,000.00 jointly and severally from all Defendants, John Hartnett will file a dismissal with prejudice of the entire action and will be responsible for all medical liens incurred for medical treatment arising of this injury. Releases are to be prepared and submitted to the Plaintiff for signature. All Parties are to bear their own costs. The City and County of San Francsico will pay $30,000.00 of the $40,000.00 which will require board approval. Mr. Brown's portion is $10,000.00. The matter will be placed on the dismissal calendar for some time in June.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2009 Set For Trial On Jun-07-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-21-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502
